error_signature: Bad Request: message is too long
title: Telegram message exceeds maximum length
symptom: The Telegram node throws an error stating 'Bad Request: message is too long' when attempting to send a message, even if the message appears short.
root_cause: The Telegram API has a strict limit on the length of messages that can be sent, which is 4,096 characters. If the message exceeds this limit, the API will return a 'Bad Request' error, even if the message seems short due to formatting or hidden characters.
fix_steps: Add a Code node before the Telegram node
Implement logic to split the message into chunks of 4096 characters or less
Send each chunk in a loop to the Telegram node
agent_instruction: Use a Code node to split long messages into smaller parts before sending them through the Telegram node.
